license: Public domain (U.S. federal government work, 17 USC 105)
title: Canoeing Nooya Lake, Ketchikan-Misty Fjords Ranger District
description: Two canoeists paddling a green canoe across the glass-calm surface of Nooya Lake inside the Ketchikan-Misty Fjords Ranger District of the Tongass National Forest, with steep snow-streaked mountains rising on the far shore. Nooya Lake is one of the signature backcountry canoe destinations inside Misty Fjords National Monument.
alt: Two canoeists on Nooya Lake in Misty Fjords Ranger District with calm mirror-like water and snow-streaked mountains behind
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from the official USFS Ketchikan-Misty Fjords Ranger District page and visually confirmed
